_comment: Structural expectations for planner output validation. Fields prefixed with 'min_' or 'max_' are numeric bounds, not exact values.

expected_task_categories.description: At least one task related to database schema or migrations
At least one task related to authentication
At least one task related to API endpoints
At least one task related to frontend UI

dependency_rules: Database schema tasks should not depend on frontend tasks
Frontend tasks should depend on at least one backend task
